ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beers" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the beer */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer style */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume (ABV) of the beer */,
  "ibu" REAL /* International Bitterness Unit (IBU) of the beer */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brewery that produces the beer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beer */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the beer image */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the beer */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the beer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breweries" (
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewery */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the brewery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the brewery */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brewery */,
  "established" TEXT /* Date the brewery was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brewery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the review */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the user (1-100) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  "helpful" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "not_helpful" INTEGER /* Number of users who did not find the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion being rated */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the user (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_ratings_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES ratings_criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "helpful" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the comment helpful */,
  "not_helpful" INTEGER /* Number of users who did not find the comment helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_breweries" (
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brewery_id", "beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the user (1-100) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beer_ratings_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beer_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "follows_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follows_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
